candidates.title: Tech Channel Video Editor Needed
candidates.brief: I publish tech-focused content several times a week and now need a reliable editor who can handle both long-form reviews (8–12 minutes) and short vertical cuts for YouTube Shorts, Reels and TikTok. I haven’t locked in a single editing style yet—the channel is still experimenting—so if you enjoy switching between fast-paced jump-cuts, more detailed explanatory pacing or an effects-heavy approach, feel free to show me what you can do. Every edit should be platform-ready. That means a 16:9 master for YouTube plus a reformatted 9:16 or 1:1 version whenever the topic suits social media. I always supply 4K footage, screen recordings, b-roll and a rough talking-head guide; you turn it into a polished story with on-brand text overlays, background music that doesn’t clash with narration, and light-weight animations that highlight specs, prices or key takeaways. candidates.title: Canva Social Media Coaching
candidates.tools: After Effects — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I need hands-on guidance inside Canva to bring a specific batch of social-media content to life. The focus is practical, project-based help rather than a full-blown course: we will open my existing Canva workspace together and build out eye-catching posts for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, plus short video assets for YouTube. My goals • Apply a consistent brand kit (fonts, colours, logo) across all four platforms • Learn quick workflows for resizing, animating and exporting files in the right aspect ratios • Pick up tips on Canva Pro features such as Magic Resize, animation timing and video trimming so I can repeat the process on my own Preferred format Live screenshare sessions (Zoom or similar) where we co-create several sample posts and a reusable template set. A short written recap or recorded walkthrough afterward would be ideal so I can refer back to it. Acceptance criteria • At lea

candidates.title: Video Editor for Traya Jewels
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: # Hiring – Video Editor | Traya Jewels About Us: Traya Jewels is a growing D2C jewellery brand specializing in handcrafted Sterling Silver jewellery. Salary: ₹8,000 – ₹15,000/month (Depending on work) Work Type: Work From Home Timing: Flexible Working Hours: Approx. 4–6 hours/day Location Preference: Ahmedabad-based applicants preferred, not mandatory Eligibility: Indians only Responsibilities: * Edit Instagram Reels and Meta Ads * Create engaging, fast-paced content optimized for conversions and engagement * Add transitions, text overlays, music, sound effects, and motion graphics where required * Repurpose existing content into multiple formats and variations * Work closely with the brand team to execute creative concepts Requirements: * Good understanding of short-form content and social media trends * Experience with Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or similar edit

candidates.title: Grow AERI Makhana Instagram France
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: Instagram Growth Manager: Launch & Scale Healthy Snack Brand (France) Project Overview We are launching a brand-new Instagram account for AERI Makhana (a premium, healthy popped water lily seed snack) targeting the French market. We need an aggressive, creative growth expert to take this account from 0 to a target milestone of 100k genuine French followers. The strategy must balance hyper-growth with community building. We want real engagement, not empty bot numbers. Because we are a new brand, we are operating on a tight startup budget. We need someone who can maximize organic reach, viral loops, and low-cost/barter collaborations. Scope of Work (What You Will Do) 1. Profile Setup & Optimization: Complete optimization for the French market (bio, highlights, localized SEO, geo-tagging). 2. Content Creation & Management: Develop a 30-day content calendar.
